name: Service Credit Forensics (SCF) v1
description: Cross-document SLA/service-credit forensics: determine eligible downtime and owed service credits from messy incident evidence (logs, email, status updates) under a public SLA policy and customer-specific contract riders.

closest_existing_evals.name: Reimbursement Forensics (BenchBench)
closest_existing_evals.why_close: both require reconciling messy, multi-document evidence into exact numeric outputs under explicit policy rules
closest_existing_evals.why_not_duplicate: domain is SLA credits and incident timelines; includes time arithmetic, exclusions, multi-region aggregation, and contract riders rather than receipts/FX/per-diem policy

closest_existing_evals.name: SWE-bench (family)

closest_existing_evals.why_not_duplicate: no code fixing; answers are numeric/boolean computed from provided evidence, graded deterministically

determinism_notes: All items are procedurally generated from a seed; gold is computed by the same rules described in the solver packet.
